title: Compliance checks: third party information notices — enablers of defeated tax avoidance — CC/FS84
body: "This factsheet provides information about third party information notices for enablers, including:   what third party information notices are how HMRC uses them the impact of not doing what the information notice asks what kind of information HMRC can and cannot ask for from a third party using an information notice   Factsheets are for guidance only and reflect HMRC’s position at the time of writing. "
